issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2009 SUZUKI GSX-R 1000. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE REGULATOR FAILED AND CAUSED THE BATTERY TO CHARGE INCORRECTLY. THE MOTORCYCLE COULD NO LONGER BE TAKEN ON LONG DRIVES. THE DEALER STATED THAT THE REGULATOR WOULD NEED TO BE REPLACED. THE MOTORCYCLE WAS NOT

narrative.headline: What 2009 Suzuki Gsx-R1000 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
